revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{s-start}} |- | style="width: 30%; text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|'''{{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}} |award = New award |assembly = New assembly |championship = New championship |chart = New chart |command = New command |constituency = New constituency |convention = New convention |creation = New creation |dicastery = New dicastery |department = New department |diocese = New diocese |district = New district |division = New division |institution = New institution |first = First |forum = New forum |loss = Loss of title |minister = New ministerial post |office = New office |parliament = New parliament |party = New political party |post = New post |programme = New programme |regiment = New regiment |riding = New riding |seat = New seat |tv = New television show |show = New show |sports = New sporting event |unit = New unit |university = New university |#default = New title }}'''{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|
